text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower has an upcoming photo shoot to
help show off her signature racewear. We're
discussing the details of the shoot when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's something that's been on my
mind about the upcoming shoot...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon is taking part in it too, so yesterday I
asked her what her vision for her photo shoot is.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A CG background with lighting that mimics the
feeling of being in outer space. Also, special
effects that accentuate the structure of my
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will use poses and camera angles to make it look
like I am floating. I composed layouts to use on
the day of the shoot based on 3D model samples
I received from the crew.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is how I will express the concept for my
signature racewear: "A high-speed battle cruiser
flying through space."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All procedures to "describe plans for photo
shoot" complete.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wow! Your plan sounds amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your kind words are appreciated. I hope I was
able to provide inspiration for you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon has thought out her plan for the shoot in
meticulous detail.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I think it's really cool how she put so much
passion into her idea, but at the same time...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It made me realize that I didn't even think of a
concept for my shoot.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was so overjoyed to have photos taken of me in
my wonderful racewear that I didn't consider
anything beyond that...
choice_data_list: Then let's figure something out together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll hit on a great idea once we start
brainstorming.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We lay out the design for Nishino Flower's
signature racewear on the table. There's bound to
be something we can use for the shoot in here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, an idea hits me.
choice_data_list: Let's focus on the motif of your racewear.
Let's focus on the colors of your racewear.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The motif? Well, that's pretty simple... It's
flowers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...I wanted the design of my racewear to reflect
both my dreams and desires. Flowers were the
first thing that came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Just as a bud will someday bloom elegantly... I
want to eventually blossom into a wonderful
grown-up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! I think I get it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My dreams and desires... They're the concept of
my racewear! Then that means...
choice_data_list: Sounds like you're on to something.
Sounds like you're on to something.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the photo shoot arrives.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Hold that pose! Love that natural smile! That
bouquet is the perfect prop to match your flower
motif!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That radiant expression is superb! That's a
keeper right there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower turns the studio into a stunning
garden, and the photos successfully capture her
emotions and brilliant smile.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The colors? Well, the yellow really pops... And
the purple makes a nice contrast.
choice_data_list: Why did you choose those colors?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to put my heart and soul into my
racewear, and I thought I could convey that with
the colors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yellow represents vibrant energy, while this
purple has a grown-up air to it... Each color
symbolizes an aspect of my ideal future self.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, this is just a thought, but maybe I can do the
shoot with a bento box!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I think my feelings will come across better in
photos featuring my racewear alongside colorful
foods.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, maybe that's too weird.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really feel like that will be able to capture her
personality and nature perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the photo shoot arrives.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Here's to a good shoot today.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, the way the afternoon light draws out the
colors in your racewear and that lovely bento
box... You look wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower spreads out the colorful lunch she
made herself and poses for the camera.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I put my heart and soul into making this food!
Please take plenty of great pictures of it with my
outfit!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Wowza! What an abundance of vibrant hues!
They're really going to bring out your smile in
these pics!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's idea helps bring out her charm in
spades, and she earns the photographer's seal of
approval. The final photos successfully capture
her brilliant smile.
